stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to communicate with other teachers using a chat function, so that I can learn from them and share experiences.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to communicate with other teachers using a chat function, so that I can learn from them and share experiences.

means.text: communicate with other teachers using a chat function

ends.text: I can learn from them and share experiences

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to learn new teaching skills such as communication skills, presentation skills, and confidence, so that I am better prepared for teaching.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to learn new teaching skills such as communication skills, presentation skills, and confidence, so that I am better prepared for teaching.

means.text: learn new teaching skills such as communication skills presentation skills and confidence

ends.text: I am better prepared for teaching

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to learn pedagogical skills such as compassion, collaboration, and inclusiveness, so that I am better prepared for teaching.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to learn pedagogical skills such as compassion, collaboration, and inclusiveness, so that I am better prepared for teaching.

means.text: learn pedagogical skills such as compassion collaboration and inclusiveness

ends.text: I am better prepared for teaching

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to complete a skills assessment that tests my teaching/pedagogical/other skill levels, so that I can be placed at the right level without wasting time or feeling frustrated by levels that are too easy or difficult.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to complete a skills assessment that tests my teaching/pedagogical/other skill levels, so that I can be placed at the right level without wasting time or feeling frustrated by levels that are too easy or difficult.

means.text: complete a skills assessment that tests my teaching/pedagogical/other skill levels

ends.text: I can be placed at the right level without wasting time or feeling frustrated by levels that are too easy or difficult

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to navigate through the modules using levels, so that I can track my learning progress.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to navigate through the modules using levels, so that I can track my learning progress.

means.text: navigate through the modules using levels

ends.text: I can track my learning progress

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to track my learning progress in a graphical overview such as a progress bar, so that I know what I have learned.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to track my learning progress in a graphical overview such as a progress bar, so that I know what I have learned.

means.text: track my learning progress in a graphical overview such as a progress bar

ends.text: I know what I have learned

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to achieve achievements rewarded for completing certain tasks, so that I get a sense of reward for completing something.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to achieve achievements rewarded for completing certain tasks, so that I get a sense of reward for completing something.

means.text: achieve achievements rewarded for completing certain tasks

ends.text: I get a sense of reward for completing something

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to do a quiz about a certain topic that is connected to a level or part of a level, so I can test my learning progress.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to do a quiz about a certain topic that is connected to a level or part of a level, so I can test my learning progress.

means.text: do a quiz about a certain topic that is connected to a level or part of a level

ends.text: I can test my learning progress

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to receive automated feedback on completed quizzes and exercises, so that I can understand what I did right or wrong.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to receive automated feedback on completed quizzes and exercises, so that I can understand what I did right or wrong.

means.text: receive automated feedback on completed quizzes and exercises

ends.text: I can understand what I did right or wrong

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to be able to indicate my technical skill level in a small test, so that my profile can reflect my background.

means.text: indicate my technical skill level in a small test

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to have a place with all relevant knowledge for teaching as a knowledge hub, so I can refer back to this when teaching.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to have a place with all relevant knowledge for teaching as a knowledge hub, so I can refer back to this when teaching.

means.text: have a place with all relevant knowledge for teaching as a knowledge hub

ends.text: I can refer back to this when teaching

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to access a collection of study books categorized by ISBN, publisher, topic, and author, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to access a collection of study books categorized by ISBN, publisher, topic, and author, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.

means.text: access a collection of study books categorized by ISBN publisher topic and author

ends.text: I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs

stories.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to have flashcards available in a digital format, organized by topic and source, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.

json.text: As a freelance teacher, I want to have flashcards available in a digital format, organized by topic and source, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.

means.text: have flashcards available in a digital format organized by topic and source

ends.text: I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs

stories.text: As an administrator, I want to check if KvK numbers are real by checking the profiles, to verify the user as a freelance teacher.
